positive: Minimalist geometric abstract illustration featuring a stylized mountain range silhouette and interconnected abstract flowing lines. The design should be centered, high contrast, and easily reproducible on apparel. Use a color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and matte cream. The style is modern, clean line art with crisp vector edges, reminiscent of Japanese woodblock prints meets Swiss graphic design. Composition must be balanced and aesthetically pleasing, suitable for repeating patterns or single focal prints. Studio lighting, highly detailed vector illustration, art deco influence.
